title: Work with PowerShell providers and PowerShell drives in Windows PowerShell
summary: This learning path explains two technologies: PowerShell providers and PowerShell drives, which let you work with many forms of storage by using the commands and techniques that you use to manage the file system.

sections.title: Work with PowerShell providers and PowerShell drives in Windows PowerShell
sections.summary: This learning path explains two technologies: PowerShell providers and PowerShell drives, which let you work with many forms of storage by using the commands and techniques that you use to manage the file system.

lessons.title: Connect with data stores using PowerShell providers
lessons.content_md:
This module covers PowerShell providers that connect Windows PowerShell to data stores. They offer an easier-to-understand and consistent interface for working with data stores.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/connect-data-stores-use-powershell-providers/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Connect with data stores using PowerShell providers

lessons.title: Use PowerShell drives in PowerShell
lessons.content_md:
This module explains how to work with PowerShell drives.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/use-powershell-drives-powershell/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Work with PowerShell providers and PowerShell drives in Windows PowerShell
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Work with PowerShell providers and PowerShell drives in Windows PowerShell**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
